title: Enforce constructor injection for Spring components
description: Spring @Controller, @Service, and @Repository classes are singletons by default, meaning only one instance of the class is ever instantiated in the application. This rule raises an issue when any non-static member of a Spring component has an injection annotation.
recommendation: Use constructor injection for all non-static members of Spring components
impact: Improves code maintainability and reduces potential security risks

checks.message: Use constructor injection for all non-static members of Spring components
